question: Show all cars from Japan with mpg greater than 30, ordered by mpg descending.
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE Origin.origin = 'japan' AND Observation.mpg > 30 ORDER BY Observation.mpg DESC;

question: List vehicles whose name contains 'ford' (case-insensitive) and that have at least 6 cylinders.
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE LOWER(Name.name) LIKE '%ford%' AND Observation.cylinders >= 6;

question: Return cars from the USA or Europe with horsepower between 100 and 200 (inclusive), sorted by horsepower ascending.
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE Origin.origin IN ('Usa','europe') AND Observation.horsepower BETWEEN 100 AND 200 ORDER BY Observation.horsepower ASC;

question: Find vehicles from model years 1970 through 1980 with weight under 3000.
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE Observation.model_year BETWEEN 1970 AND 1980 AND Observation.weight < 3000;

question: Show the 5 lightest cars (lowest weight) that have non-null horsepower.
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE Observation.horsepower IS NOT NULL ORDER BY Observation.weight ASC LIMIT 5;

question: Which cars accelerate slower than 15 seconds and have mpg below 20?
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE Observation.acceleration > 15 AND Observation.mpg < 20;

question: List all cars with exactly 4 cylinders and mpg between 25 and 35, ordered by model year descending.
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE Observation.cylinders = 4 AND Observation.mpg BETWEEN 25 AND 35 ORDER BY Observation.model_year DESC;

question: Find vehicles with names starting with 'chev' (case-insensitive) that originate from USA.
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE LOWER(Name.name) LIKE 'chev%' AND Origin.origin = 'USA';

question: Show cars whose weight is NULL or horsepower is NULL.
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE Observation.weight IS NULL OR Observation.horsepower IS NULL;

question: Return cars from Japan that have mpg greater than the average mpg of all cars.
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE Origin.origin = 'japan' AND Observation.mpg > (SELECT AVG(mpg) FROM Observation);

question: Show all cars produced before 1975 or after 1982 that have weight greater than 2000.
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE (Observation.model_year < 1975 OR Observation.model_year > 1982) AND Observation.weight > 2000;

question: Find vehicles with mpg greater than or equal to 40 and fewer than 5 cylinders.
sql: SELECT Name.name, Observation.mpg, Observation.cylinders, Observation.horsepower, Observation.weight, Observation.model_year, Observation.acceleration FROM Observation INNER JOIN Name ON Name.name_id=Observation.name_id INNER JOIN Origin on Origin.origin_id=Observation.origin_id WHERE Observation.mpg >= 40 AND Observation.cylinders < 5;
